---
title: Café en rose
author: Raphaële Slimane
image: https://res.cloudinary.com/dyjfju0u4/image/upload/f_auto,q_auto/v1784549197/caferose_j8e3pw.jpg
description: Intérieur de café rose
categories: [urbansketch]
date: 2023/04/01
format:
  html:
    page-layout: full
---

![](https://res.cloudinary.com/dyjfju0u4/image/upload/f_auto,q_auto/v1784549197/caferose_j8e3pw.jpg)


::: {.visually-hidden}
{{< meta description >}}
:::
